underlying_goal: Review and fix CI failures on a PR, then iteratively improve the code quality, address Cursor Bugbot comments, and remove unrelated changes from the PR
friction_detail: Claude initially removed the interpret conversation special-case handling (prune_interpret_conversation) based on user suggestion, but then had to add it back after Cursor Bugbot correctly identified that DeleteSource doesn't support interpret conversations.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to pull a PR, fix CI failures, review and improve the code, address Cursor Bugbot comments, and revert unrelated changes — all were successfully completed across multiple iterative rounds.
